column2: Introduce rules-based meta and rule-test builder
column3: Extract or replace sync-meta algorithms with a reusable builder that scans .fabric/rules as the rule source of truth, emits agents.meta nodes with content_ref, stable_id, layer/level, descriptions/sections, hash, and computes rule-test.index from @fabric-verify annotations. Do not expose a CLI command.
